dataset_context.note: Failure cases represent only about 3.4% of the dataset, so accuracy is treated as a secondary metric.

metric_interpretation.failure_recall: Percentage of real failures detected by the model.
metric_interpretation.alert_precision: Percentage of predicted alerts that were actual failures.
metric_interpretation.roc_auc: Overall ranking/separation quality between normal and failure cases.
metric_interpretation.pr_auc: Precision-recall performance, especially relevant for imbalanced datasets.
